consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: Wikimedia disambiguation page
description_wiki: North American describes any entity, people, group, or attribute of North Americans, especially of the United States and Canada together.

description: city in San Mateo County, California, United States
description_wiki: Redwood City is a city in San Mateo County, California, on the San Francisco Peninsula in the Bay Area of Northern California, approximately 27 miles (43 km) south of San Francisco and 24 miles (39 km) northwest of San Jose.

aliases: Great San Francisco Earthquake and Fire
description: major earthquake that struck San Francisco and the coast of Northern California
description_wiki: The 1906 San Francisco earthquake was a major earthquake which struck the coast of Northern California at 05:12 am Pacific Standard Time on Wednesday, April 18, 1906.

surface_forms: the state created the Alien Land Law
description: series of discriminatory laws in the United States
description_wiki: Alien land laws were a series of legislative attempts to discourage Asian and other "non-desirable" immigrants from settling permanently in U.S. states and territories by limiting their ability to own land and property.

description: city in San Mateo County, California, United States
description_wiki: Half Moon Bay is a coastal city in San Mateo County, California, United States, approximately 25 miles (40 kilometers) south of San Francisco.

description: consolidated city-county and capital of Colorado, United States
description_wiki: Denver  (  DEN-vər) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Colorado.

description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: US government agency established to handle the internment of Japanese Americans during World War II
description_wiki: The War Relocation Authority (WRA) was a United States government agency established to handle the internment of Japanese Americans during World War II.  It also operated the Fort Ontario Emergency Refugee Shelter in Oswego, New York, which was the only refugee camp set up in the United States for refugees from Europe.

description: worldwide economic depression (1929–1939)
description_wiki: The Great Depression was a severe global economic downturn from 1929 to 1939.

description: Japanese multinational banking and financial services company
description_wiki: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation (株式会社三井住友銀行, Kabushiki-gaisha Mitsui Sumitomo Ginkō; SMBC) is a Japanese multinational banking financial services institution owned by the Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group, which is also known as the SMBC Group.

description: dissolved bank in Japan
description_wiki: The Yokohama Specie Bank (横浜正金銀行, Yokohama Shōkin Ginkō; YSB) was a Japanese bank founded in Yokohama in 1880, which dominated the Japanese market for trade finance in subsequent decades.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: U.S. federal law enforcement agency
description_wiki: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) is the domestic intelligence and security service of the United States and its principal federal law enforcement agency.

description: university system in California, United States
description_wiki: The University of California (UC) is a public land-grant research university system in the U.S. state of California.

description: geographic region in Northeast Asia
description_wiki: Manchuria is a historical region in Northeast Asia encompassing the entirety of present-day Northeast China and parts of the modern-day Russian Far East south of the Uda River and the Tukuringra-Dzhagdy ranges.

description: island in San Francisco Bay in California, United States of America
description_wiki: Angel Island (Spanish: Isla de los Ángeles) is an island in San Francisco Bay.

aliases: Heald School of Engineering and Mining
description: for-profit college
description_wiki: Heald College was a private for-profit business–career college with its main campus in San Francisco, California.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Kagoshima Prefecture (鹿児島県, Kagoshima-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [ka.ɡo.ɕi.ma, -maꜜ.keɴ, ka.ŋo-]) is a prefecture of Japan located on the island of Kyushu and the Ryukyu Islands.
